classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: Blood-soaked gladiators in dented armor, acrobatic duelists with darting swords, or far-eyed elven archers who carve their legends with steel and grit.

class_features.name: Hauler
class_features.description: Add your Constitution modifier, if positive, to your gear slots.

class_features.name: Weapon Mastery
class_features.description: Choose one type of weapon. You gain +1 to attack and damage with that weapon type. In addition, add half your level to these rolls (round down).

class_features.name: Grit
class_features.description: Choose Strength or Dexterity. You have advantage on checks of that type to overcome an opposing force.

talents_table.effect: Gain Weapon Mastery with one additional weapon type
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution stat
Choose one kind of armor. You get +1 AC from that armor
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Priest
classes.description: Crusading templars, prophetic shamans, or mad-eyed zealots who wield the power of their gods to cleanse the unholy.

fixed: Choice of Celestial, Diabolic, or Primordial

class_features.name: Turn Undead
class_features.description: You know the turn undead spell. It doesn't count toward your number of known spells.

class_features.name: Deity
class_features.description: Choose a god to serve who matches your alignment. You have a holy symbol for your god (takes up no gear slots).

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast priest spells you know. You know two tier 1 spells at level 1. Use Wisdom for spellcasting checks.

talents_table.effect: Gain advantage on casting one spell you know
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Thief
classes.description: Rooftop assassins, grinning con artists, or cloaked cat burglars who can pluck a gem from the claws of a sleeping demon.

class_features.name: Backstab
class_features.description: Deal an extra weapon die of damage against unaware targets. Add additional dice equal to half your level (round down).

class_features.name: Thievery
class_features.description: You have the necessary tools (0 slots). You have advantage on checks for: Climbing, Sneaking/Hiding, Disguises, Traps, and Delicate tasks (picking pockets/locks).

talents_table.effect: Gain advantage on initiative rolls (reroll if duplicate)
Your Backstab deals +1 dice of damage
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Charisma stat
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Wizard
classes.description: Rune-tattooed adepts, bespectacled magi, and flame-conjuring witches who dare to manipulate the fell forces of magic.

class_features.name: Learning Spells
class_features.description: Study a spell scroll for a day and pass a DC 15 INT check to learn it permanently. These do not count toward your known spells limit.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast wizard spells you know. You start with three tier 1 spells. Use Intelligence for spellcasting checks.

talents_table.effect: Make 1 random magic item of a type you choose
+2 to Intelligence stat or +1 to wizard spellcasting checks
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know
Learn one additional wizard spell of any tier you know
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Bard
classes.description: Bards are welcome wanderers and wise advisors; it is their task to protect and share knowledge handed down through the ages.

class_features.name: Bardic Arts
class_features.description: You're trained in oration, performing arts, lore, and diplomacy. You have advantage on related checks.

class_features.name: Magical Dabbler
class_features.description: You can activate spell scrolls and wands using Charisma as your spellcasting stat. If you critically fail, roll a wizard mishap.

class_features.name: Presence
class_features.description: Make a DC 12 CHA check to enact one of the following effects. If you fail (excluding focus), you can't use that effect again until you rest.

effects.name: Inspire
effects.description: One target in near range gains a luck token.

effects.name: Fascinate
effects.description: You transfix all chosen targets of level 4 or less within near range.

class_features.name: Prolific
class_features.description: Add 1d6 to your learning rolls. Groups carousing with 1 or more bards add 1d6 to their rolls.

talents_table.effect: You find a random priest or wizard wand (you choose)
+1 to melee and ranged attacks or +1 to Magical Dabbler rolls
+2 points to distribute to any stats
Your Presence effects become DC 9 to enact (reroll if duplicate)

classes.name: Ranger
classes.description: Skilled trackers, stealthy wanderers, and peerless warriors who call the wilds their home.

class_features.name: Wayfinder
class_features.description: You have advantage on checks associated with: Navigation, Tracking, Bushcraft, Stealth, and Wild animals.

class_features.name: Herbalism
class_features.description: Make an INT check to prepare an herbal remedy you choose. If you fail, you can't make that remedy again until you successfully rest. Unused remedies expire in 3 rounds.

remedies.name: Stimulant
remedies.effect: You can't be surprised for 10 rounds.

remedies.name: Foebane
remedies.effect: You get advantage on attacks and damage against one creature type you choose for 1d6 rounds.

remedies.name: Curative
remedies.effect: Equivalent to a Potion of Healing.

talents_table.effect: You deal d12 damage with one weapon type you choose
+1 to melee or ranged attacks and damage
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Intelligence stat
You gain advantage on Herbalism checks for a remedy you choose
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Cursedblade
classes.description: A cursing spellcaster who gains mystical energy from a powerful being and welds it through a weapon.

class_features.name: Magic Weapon
class_features.description: Use your action to touch one weapon and imbue magical energy into it with a spellcasting check by rolling 1d20 + your Charisma modifier (DC 11 to succeed). The weapon becomes magical and has +1 to attack and damage rolls for 3 rounds. If you fail your spellcasting check, you don't need to complete a rest to reuse the ability in the same day.

class_features.name: Eldritch Blast
class_features.description: To fire a beam of energy, make a spellcasting check by rolling 1d20 + your Charisma modifier (DC 11 to succeed). The beam does 1d4 damage within far range. If you fail your spellcasting check, you don't need to complete a rest to reuse the ability in the same day.

class_features.name: Patron Boon
class_features.description: Choose a patron to serve or create one with game master approval. The source of your supernatural power is your patron. You gain a new Patron Boon at even character levels.

patron_boons.effect: Read all written languages and symbols.
Summon a Skeleton or Ghoul for one hour each day (Use Action).
Read surface thoughts of one creature you can see within near range (Use Action).
You apply disadvantage to the next d20 roll a target makes within far range (Use Action).
Detect magic effects and properties within near range that are seen (Use Action).
You don't need to breathe air to survive.

talents_table.effect: +1 to melee damage rolls with weapons.

classes.name: Elemental Warrior
classes.description: A martial artist who has mastered controlling their internal energy to release it as devastating elemental blows and blasts.

class_features.name: Elemental Expert
class_features.description: You have advantage on knowledge checks related to fire, electricity, water, earth, air and spirits.

class_features.name: Unarmored
class_features.description: You can use Dexterity or Constitution when calculating your armor class.

class_features.name: Elemental Blow
class_features.description: You can make unarmed melee strikes with your hands, feet, elbows, knees and head. Roll 1d20 + your Strength or Dexterity modifier + talent bonuses to make an attack roll. Unarmed strikes do 1d6 damage. When you declare a melee attack you may select the damage type: normal, fire, electrical, cold, or acid.

class_features.name: Elemental Blast
class_features.description: To fire a magical beam or bolt of fire, electricity, cold or acid, make a spellcasting check by rolling 1d20 + your Constitution modifier (DC 11 to succeed). The blast does 1d4 damage within far range for character levels 1 to 5. The blast does 1d6 damage within far range for character levels 6 to 10.

talents_table.effect: Gain advantage on spellcasting checks (reroll if duplicated).

classes.name: Monster Slayer
classes.description: A seeker of Vampires, Dragons, fiends, fey and evil monsters of the dark. You kill evil creatures that threaten the world.

class_features.name: Monster Expert
class_features.description: You know if and what immunities a monster with a chaotic alignment has when within near range. You are also an expert on monsters and creatures, gaining advantage on checks related to knowing about them.

class_features.name: Stalker
class_features.description: You are an expert in detecting monsters and stealth. You get advantage on checks related to sensing a creature, sneaking and hiding.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: To cast a Monster Slayer spell you know, make a spellcasting check by rolling 1d20 + your Wisdom modifier.

talents_table.effect: +1 to melee and ranged attack rolls.
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls.

classes.name: Mystical Archer
classes.description: An expert warrior in channeling magic into arrows fired from a bow. Skilled in mystical knowledge and identification.

class_features.name: Detecting Magic
class_features.description: You can cast the Detect Magic spell with a DC 11 spellcasting check, using Intelligence, Wisdom or Charisma.

class_features.name: Mystical Knowledge
class_features.description: You have advantage on checks related to knowledge on magic.

class_features.name: Magical Shot
class_features.description: You can imbue an arrow with magical energy when you fire it from a bow. You can use one of the following magical effects with your arrow each round.

shot_options.name: Sharp Arrow
shot_options.effect: You gain +1 to a damage roll with an arrow.

shot_options.name: Accurate Arrow
shot_options.effect: You gain +1 to an attack roll with an arrow.

shot_options.name: Seeker Arrow
shot_options.effect: No disadvantage when shooting targets in cover with an arrow.

shot_options.name: Elemental Arrow
shot_options.effect: You can change the damage the arrow does to: fire, electrical, cold or acid.

shot_options.name: Returning Arrow
shot_options.effect: Once this arrow hits or misses its target, it returns to your quiver.

shot_options.name: Paralysing Arrow
shot_options.effect: A target hit by this arrow is paralyzed for 1 round.

classes.name: Psychic Infiltrator
classes.description: A spy who strikes the psyche, infiltrates the mind and body with psionic power.

class_features.name: Psychic Blade
class_features.description: Use your action to create an invisible psychic blade that does 1d6 damage when you hit a target. Make a DC 12 Constitution or Wisdom check to form the blade for 1 minute; success grants +1 to attack and damage rolls. If you fail the check, you must rest to regain the magical blade.

class_features.name: Shadow Veil
class_features.description: You have advantage on checks related to hiding and sneaking.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: To cast a Psychic Infiltrator spell you know, make a spellcasting check by rolling 1d20 + your Constitution or Wisdom modifier.

talents_table.effect: +1 to melee and ranged attack rolls.
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls.

classes.name: Samurai
classes.description: A military soldier, trained in swordsmanship, archery, and other martial arts. The Samurai are skilled in combat, tactics, arts and have a special code of conduct.

class_features.name: Bushido Code
class_features.description: Immune to fear effects.

class_features.name: Aesthetic
class_features.description: Advantage on checks related to literature and art. You can write official documents using paper, ink, quills and advanced calligraphy.

class_features.name: Samurai Style
class_features.description: Select one fighting style you have mastered at level 1. Select a new Samurai style at every even level.

styles.name: Kenjutsu
styles.effect: Gain +1 to attack and damage with a sword. In addition, add half your level to these rolls (round down).

styles.name: Jujutsu
styles.effect: Unarmed strikes can grapple or throw the target onto the ground.

styles.name: Sojutsu
styles.effect: Gain +1 to attack and damage with the spear, while knocking the target prone.

styles.name: Kyujutsu
styles.effect: Gain +1 to attack and damage with the bow, while ignoring cover penalty.

styles.name: Aikiken
styles.effect: +1 armor class while wielding a sword to parry.

styles.name: Bojutsu
styles.effect: Gain +1 to attack and damage with the staff, while pushing a target out of close range or tripping them onto the ground.

classes.name: Shadow Stalker
classes.description: An experienced hunter that uses the darkness, detecting and hunting creatures.

class_features.name: Ambusher
class_features.description: You have advantage on Initiative rolls. You're an expert in sneaking and hiding, gaining advantage on related checks.

class_features.name: Iron Mind
class_features.description: You have advantage on checks that affect your mind.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: To cast a Shadow Stalker spell you know, make a spellcasting check by rolling 1d20 + your Wisdom modifier.

talents_table.effect: +1 to melee and ranged attack rolls.
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls.

classes.name: Spellsword
classes.description: A mage that incorporates swordplay and magical dance with music.

class_features.name: Bless
class_features.description: You know the Bless spell. It doesn't count toward your number of known spells.

class_features.name: Performance
class_features.description: Advantage on checks related to performance, dancing and singing.

class_features.name: Blade Magic
class_features.description: You can cast wizard spells you know through the blade you hold. You know two tier 1 spells of your choice from the wizard spell list. Each time you gain a level, you choose new wizard spells to learn according to the Spellsword Spells Known table.

talents_table.effect: +1 to melee or ranged attack rolls.
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know.

classes.name: Swashbuckler
classes.description: A lightly armored acrobatic fencer that is an expert in the blade, acrobatics and charm.

class_features.name: Dual-Wielder
class_features.description: Make two attacks on your turn, provided you are holding a rapier and dagger in each hand. Otherwise you can make two attacks with two daggers in each hand.

class_features.name: Rapier
class_features.description: The Swashbuckler has access to the Rapier (Cost: 8 gp, Type: M, Range: C, Damage: 1d6, Properties: Finesse).

class_features.name: Gentile
class_features.description: You are an expert at acrobatics, stealth, guile and romance. You are trained in all skills related to Dexterity and Charisma and have advantage on any associated checks.

talents_table.effect: +1 to melee and ranged attack rolls.
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls.

classes.name: War Mage
classes.description: A magic-user trained for war on the battlefield that wears armor.
armor: Special — Arcane Armor only (see class feature)

class_features.name: Arcane Armor
class_features.description: You can transform leather armor into magical armor that only you can wear, granting AC 11 + your Dexterity modifier. You can cast spells while wearing this arcane armor.

class_features.name: Detect Magic
class_features.description: You know the Detect Magic spell. It doesn't count toward your number of known spells.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast wizard spells you know. You know two tier 1 spells at 1st level. Each time you gain a level, you choose new wizard spells according to the War Mage Spells Known table.

talents_table.effect: +1 to melee or ranged attack rolls.
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know.

classes.name: War Master
classes.description: A master of weapons that can utilize multiple techniques during a battle.

class_features.name: Blacksmith
class_features.description: You can make and repair armor, weapons and metal items. As an expert in metal crafting you have access to a forge, smithing tools and materials.

class_features.name: Art of War
class_features.description: You have advantage on checks related to war, historic battles, military organizations and combat tactics.

class_features.name: Maneuvers
class_features.description: You employ specialized techniques to defeat your enemy. Declare one of the following techniques with your weapon attack each round.

maneuvers.name: Disarm
maneuvers.effect: When you hit a target you can take the weapon it holds off them or knock it to the ground.

maneuvers.name: Parry
maneuvers.effect: When you hit a target, increase your armor class by +1 for one round.

maneuvers.name: Evade
maneuvers.effect: Rather than making an attack you dodge, and the enemy has disadvantage on attack rolls for one round.

maneuvers.name: Precision
maneuvers.effect: Your attack rolls have +1 to hit for one round.

maneuvers.name: Power
maneuvers.effect: Your damage roll gains +1 for one round.

maneuvers.name: Trip
maneuvers.effect: When you hit a target, you also knock it to the ground.

maneuvers.name: Push
maneuvers.effect: When you hit a target while using a shield, you can push it back to near range.

talents_table.effect: You get +1 AC from the armor you wear.
+1 to melee and ranged attack rolls.
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls.
